description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a compact bullpup configuration, characterized by its angular, geometric body and integrated suppressor at the muzzle. The receiver and stock are constructed from a combination of matte-finished metal and polymer, with a prominent thumbhole grip and a skeletonized trigger guard for ergonomic handling. A full-length Picatinny rail runs along the top, supporting iron sights and allowing for additional attachments. The magazine is housed behind the grip, contributing to the weapon's short overall length and balanced weight distribution. The surface is primarily a mix of light and dark gray tones, with subtle texturing for grip and durability. Visible screws, seams, and mechanical details suggest a robust, modular construction suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, bullpup-style tactical shotgun with a suppressor, thumbhole grip, and full-length Picatinny rail, finished in light and dark gray polymer and metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle with suppressor, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thumbhole grip, skeletonized trigger guard, magazine placement, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's end, rear sight, and the alignment of the rail and suppressor.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, thumbhole grip, and additional mechanical details on the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with integrated suppressor and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, skeletonized trigger guard with angular contours and integrated finger grooves
